name: public_health_mutual_aid_request_conflicts_cedar_rig_utl
premise: A Public Health response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving public health mutual aid request conflicts cedar rig utl. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before the next automated batch runs. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as rights vs utility under pressure. A whistleblower has already contacted media; the narrative is forming now. Constraints: Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability. Keep public statements strictly factual; label assumptions.

agents.name: Ravi Patel
agents.identity: I am Ravi Patel, accountable for a defensible call in Public Health when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays utility for rights.

agents.name: Ansel Sato
agents.identity: I am Ansel Sato, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Public Health.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so utility isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of rights.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect utility.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to utility to secure rights under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before the next automated batch runs. Evidence is partial. Ravi Patel must decide under rights vs utility. What does Ravi Patel do?
